Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class DiscoveryFieldMap

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.DiscoveryFieldMap
public class DiscoveryFieldMap extends Object

Java class for DiscoveryFieldMap complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DiscoveryFieldMap">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="mappedField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="modelField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="sobjectFieldJoinKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="source" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceFieldJoinKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sourceType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryFieldMapSourceType"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
